use_cases: Interactive background for landing pages that responds to mouse movement
Mouse-reactive hero section with organic dot patterns
Dynamic visual effect for portfolios and creative websites
Engaging background for SaaS product showcases
Ambient interactive element for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A canvas-based interactive dot grid component that creates organic, mouse-reactive visual effects. Dots dynamically expand and contract based on cursor proximity using Perlin-like noise algorithms, creating a smooth radial morphing effect. Perfect for immersive landing pages and hero sections where subtle interactivity enhances user engagement.
